name: desktop-pet-monorepo
description: Top-level scripts for the desktop pet project

scripts.dev:
printf 'Use one role per machine:
  npm run dev:server
  npm run dev:pet
  npm run dev:web

Single-machine smoke test only:
  npm run dev:all-local
'
scripts.dev:all-local: ./pet/node_modules/.bin/concurrently -k -n server,pet,web -c yellow,green,cyan "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:pet:local" "npm run dev:web"
